subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-21 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Six and thirty souls ascended unto the throne of dominion, and though each was bound to name and sign, of none remaineth now a name or trace save Bahlúl [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سی و شش نفر بر تخت خلافت نشستند و همه مقید بنام و نشان و از هیچ کدام نام و نشانی نمانده ولی بهلول
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @stories; anecdotes, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
